name: Classic Chicken Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breasts, pounded flat
3 3/4 cups (6 oz.) wide egg noodles, uncooked
Jar Chicken Tonight Cooking Sauce for Chicken Cacciatore
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Dip chicken in beaten eggs, then coat thoroughly with bread crumbs.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add chicken and cook on both sides until lightly browned. Drain on paper towels.
4. Pour half of the sauce into an 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Layer chicken in the dish, pour remaining sauce evenly over chicken.
6. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella and grated Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until bubbly.
8. Meanwhile, cook egg noodles according to package directions and drain.
9. Heat remaining sauce.
10. Place cooked noodles on serving platter and spoon sauce over noodles.
11. Arrange chicken pieces on top.
